title: Blast Barood
desc: When Prem's new bike gets punctured, he parks it in a nearby locality and decides to come and take it back the next day. However, when he returns, he finds his beloved bike missing from the place.

title: Bholaa
desc: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Real Tevar
desc: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Bhaje Vaayu Vegam
desc: A budding cricketer bets big to fund his father's surgery but is betrayed by a bookie. Seeking revenge, he lands on a crime website, facing unexpected dangers that test his resolve.

title: Veera The Power
desc: Porus, a strong-minded IPS aspirant from a middle-class family in Chennai, comes across a series of dark secrets while investigating his sister's murder.
